---
name: G Trucking Context
description: G runs a trucking operation. Key doc types: rate cons, BOLs, OTR settlements, driver settlements, invoices.
type: user
---

G operates a trucking company (Origin Transport). The pipeline processes the standard trucking doc set: rate confirmations, bills of lading, OTR settlements, driver settlements, carrier invoices, broker invoices, lumper receipts, PODs.

QBO integration is load-bearing: invoice extraction + attachment flow must be reliable.
